byline: Tecnológico de Monterrey, Mexico · One-semester internship
title: Four New Interns Join HEART from Tec de Monterrey
summary: We are happy to welcome four new internship students from Tecnológico de Monterrey, Mexico, joining the HEART team for a one-semester research internship.
body: Please welcome Humberto, Javier, Melanie, and Efrain, who join us from Tecnológico de Monterrey, Mexico for a one-semester internship.
During their stay they will contribute to ongoing research at the intersection of physical AI, agentic AI, and human-robot interaction, while experiencing life and research culture in Japan.
